The '''J-type Naboo star skiff'''<ref name="TVE" /> also known as the '''Naboo star skiff'''<ref name="SW-Senate Spy Episode Gallery">{{SW|url=series/clone-wars/senate-spy-episode-gallery|text="Senate Spy" Episode Gallery}}</ref> was a [[starship]] used by the [[Naboo]] [[senator]] [[Padmé Amidala]]. She flew it to [[Mustafar]] to confront [[Anakin Skywalker]] after she learned that he had turned to the [[Dark side of the Force|dark side]]. [[Obi-Wan Kenobi]] snuck aboard to confront Skywalker, and when he emerged from the skiff, Skywalker believed Amidala had betrayed him and [[Force choke]]d her. After defeating Skywalker in a [[Duel on Mustafar|duel]], Kenobi transported her in the skiff to [[Polis Massa]], where she gave birth to [[Luke Skywalker|Luke]] and [[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo|Leia]] before [[Death|dying]].<ref name="Episode III" />

{{Ship-stub}}
